highlights.text: I wrote on Thursday at 4pm: “A Failed Breakdown of today’s 6370 daily low is always of interest.” I also wrote last Thursday at 4pm: “My general lean is to defer to the trend.
My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
I wrote at the close yesterday: “ My general lean is always to defer to the trend.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into the Failed Breakdown we saw last Friday that started this entire 130+ point squeeze cycle (this was the quintessential Failed Breakdown and was provided to readers in advance).
The range is mostly 6461-6494 with a magnet at 6474 but this will expand and morph.

post_title: [Re-Send] Nvidia Earnings Incoming For SPX. Expect Volatility. Can Bulls Keep The Run Going? August 28 Plan
